A murdered gangster makes a deal with the devil, agreeing to take over and corrupt a crusading judge's identity in return for avenging his murder.
programme.title: Angel on My Shoulder

programme.desc: The judge's (Lewis Stone) son (Mickey Rooney) goes to college after serving in the war and finds his sweetheart (Bonita Granville) is engaged to someone else.
programme.title: Love Laughs at Andy Hardy

programme.desc: Hopalong Cassidy (William Boyd) and his sidekicks (Russell Hayden, Andy Clyde) save a gold miner's daughter from a gambler.
programme.title: Pirates on Horseback

programme.desc: A chemist (Dennis O'Keefe), his wife (Ruth Warrick) and a trainer's daughter (Gail Russell) form a romantic triangle around a champion trotter.
programme.title: The Great Dan Patch

programme.desc: A Hollywood wheeler-dealer (William Watters) exploits a motorcycling rock 'n' roller (Arch Hall Jr.) new in town.
programme.title: Wild Guitar

programme.desc: A Quaker (Gail Russell) and her family reform a wounded outlaw (John Wayne) who has a killer on his trail.
programme.title: Angel and the Badman

programme.desc: Blondie (Penny Singleton) steps in when Dagwood's (Arthur Lake) boss demotes him for buying the wrong real estate.
programme.title: Blondie's Reward

programme.desc: Oscar-winning adaptation of the Broadway hit about an English professor (Rex Harrison) who teaches a cockney merchant (Audrey Hepburn) to be a lady.
programme.title: My Fair Lady

programme.desc: For his fiancée's charity a stockbroker bets friends that for 24 hours he will tell only the truth.
programme.title: Nothing but the Truth

programme.desc: Scout William F. Cody (Joel McCrea) marries a U.S. senator's daughter (Maureen O'Hara), fights the Cheyenne and leads a Wild West show.
programme.title: Buffalo Bill

programme.desc: A hit man (Frank Sinatra) and company plan to shoot the president when he gets off his train in Suddenly, Calif.
programme.title: Suddenly

programme.desc: A secret agent (Anthony Eisley) and his boss (Wandisa Leigh) check a madman's sabotage of U.S. moonshots.
programme.title: Lightning Bolt

programme.desc: In a society where life ends at age 30, a law enforcement officer known as a Sandman (Michael York) flees with another 30-year-old (Jenny Agutter) when he learns his number has come up prematurely.
programme.title: Logan's Run

programme.desc: Veterans of the 82nd Airborne Division devise an elaborate plot to simultaneously rob five casinos on New Year's Eve.
programme.title: Ocean's Eleven

programme.desc: A killer of Detroit clergy confesses to a priest (Donald Sutherland), who turns sleuth because he cannot tell the police.
programme.title: The Rosary Murders

programme.desc: An exile (John Richardson) from a hostile tribe woos a woman (Raquel Welch) from a gentle tribe amid monsters and an earthquake.
programme.title: One Million Years B.C.

programme.desc: A bomber pilot (Spencer Tracy) goes to heaven and becomes guardian angel to another pilot (Van Johnson) courting his old girlfriend (Irene Dunne).
programme.title: A Guy Named Joe

programme.desc: The mythical Greek hero (Reg Park) rescues a maiden left at the mercy of a beast and goes on to save his son from the sexist queen of lost Atlantis (Fay Spain).
programme.title: Hercules and the Captive Women

programme.desc: Newlyweds (Lucille Ball, Desi Arnaz) splurge on a trailer for their honeymoon, which includes Yosemite National Park.
programme.title: The Long, Long Trailer

programme.desc: To evade gangsters, two men (Tony Curtis, Jack Lemmon) don skirts and makeup and join an all-girl band with a sizzling singer (Marilyn Monroe).
programme.title: Some Like It Hot

programme.desc: Two guys (Chuck Norris, Louis Gossett Jr.) and a girl (Melody Anderson) brave jungle hazards to find an Aztec temple filled with gold.
programme.title: Firewalker

programme.desc: An English girl's dream of racing her horse in the Grand National thunders to reality with the help of a former jockey.
programme.title: National Velvet

Believer’s Voice of Victory
programme.desc: KCMis committed to keeping the Word of God before your eyes—teaching you how tolive victoriously—so that you are rooted and grounded enough to overcome yourown adversity, reach out to others and share those same principles. programme.title: Rick Renner

Rick also distinctively shares Bible principles through contemporary illustrations set against an extensive cultural and historical backdrop of New Testament times. In each episode of “Rick Renner,” Rick teaches in-depth on a passage of Scripture verse by verse, centered around a specific theme that is vitally relevant to the lives of believers who are hungry to dig deeper into the treasures of God’s Word.
